metadata.description:
I. Regular Business
1. Resident Concerns
2. Chair Update/Town Manager Update/Members Minute
II. Public Hearings
3. 7:15 PM Use Special Permit, #03/16/22 – 483, 19 Keefe Road
http://doc.acton-ma.gov/dsweb/View/Collection-14774
4. 7:25 PM All Alcoholic Beverage License and Common Victualler, Santa Fe
Burrito Grill Acton, LLC, 297 Main Street, Acton
III. New/Special Business
5. Discuss and Vote to Recommend Acton Power Choice Rate Structure
6. Presentations from Citizen Petition Sponsors
7. Review and Consider Voting on Recommendations for Warrant Articles
8. Discuss Annual Town Meeting
9. Consider Approving an Intermunicipal Agreement with the Town of Concord for
Wayfinding Signage
10. Approve Revisions to Revised Building Permit Fees
11. Authorize Chair to Sign Letter of Support for Vacant Storefront Application
IV. Consent Items
12. Committee Appointment, David Shoemaker, Associate to Full Member, Historic
District Commission (current term to expire June 30, 2022)
13. Committee Appointment, Hilary Reid, Associate Member, Land Stewardship
Committee (term to expire June 30, 2023)
14. Committee Appointment, Michelle Holmberg, Associate to Full Member, Council
on Aging (new term to expire June 30, 2025)
15. Accept Gift, Recreation Division for $1,500 from 421 Gas, Inc. to Support the
2022 Summer Concert Series and Events
16. Accept Gift, Recreation Department for $1,500 from Insulet Corporation to
Support the 2022 Summer Concert Series and Events
Page 2 of 2
17. Accept Gift, Recreation Department for $500 from Prestigious Tree &
Landscaping to Support the 2022 Summer Concert Series and Special Events
18. Accept Gift, Recreation Department for $1,500 from Pro Tech Towing &
Recovery to Support the 2022 Summer Concert Series and Special Events
19. One Day Alcoholic Beverage License, Leigh Loder, NARA Park, May 14, 2022
20. One Day Alcoholic Beverage License, St. Elizabeth’s of Hungary, 89 Arlington
Street, April 30, 2022
21. One Day Alcoholic Beverage License, Mark A. diCicco Ent., NARA Park, May
7, 2022
22. One Day Alcoholic Beverage License, Sheri Cetin, NARA Park, May 15, 2022
Additional materials can be found online: http://doc.acton-ma.gov/dsweb/View/Collection15026
